title: 3L, 5L, 9L Stainless Steel Pedal Bin Dustbin Bathroom Kitchen Office (3L)
features: Odour Proof and silent closing lid pedal bin

description: Durable opening mechanism Odour Proof and silent closing lid pedal bin Quality stainless steel. Clever hinge design lid stays open if desired. Robust pedal mechanism. A great addition to any household Quality design with holding handle Ideal for bedrooms, bathrooms and kitchens With removable handled plastic inner for easy waste disposal Elegant pedal bin
